summary:
Fixed the regression.

Problem  
v2 API responses dropped three fields that existed in v1 (avatar_url, bio, location). The compatibility test in test.sh therefore failed.

Fix  
1. Restored the missing fields to the UserV2 struct.  
2. Updated ToV2() to copy those values from InternalUser.  
3. Clarified the comment that v2 must remain a superset of v1.

All tests now pass:

$ ./test.sh
v1 user response fields: avatar_url, bio, created_at, email, id, location, name, role, updated_at  
v2 user response fields: avatar_url, bio, created_at, department, email, id, is_active, location, name, phone_number, role, updated_at  

Checking field compatibility...  
PASS: All v1 fields present in v2  
PASS: v2 has new fields (department=Engineering, phone_number=+1-555-0101)  
PASS: v2 API is backward-compatible with v1

The server starts successfully and the backward-compatibility guarantee is preserved.
